content.text: How do I list recently modified log files?

Here are two approaches:

**PowerShell:**
```powershell
Get-ChildItem -Path C:\logs -Filter *.log -Recurse |
  Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt (Get-Date).AddDays(-7) } |
  Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending
```

**Bash:**
```bash
find /var/log -name '*.log' -mtime -7 -ls | sort -k8,8 -k9,9
```

Both show files modified in the last 7 days, sorted by time.
